goal: Generate a compact editorial vehicle card image showing an efficient economy sedan in an Orlando residential or suburban context — used as a zone illustration in the search results page.

creative_direction.core_idea: Un sedán limpio y eficiente que representa mobilidad asequible y confiable en Orlando
creative_direction.visual_thesis: Esta es la opción economía: accesible, limpia, trustworthy — la elección eficiente para Orlando

composition.shot_type: editorial vehicle card, close to eye level
composition.layout: vehicle centered, background softly recognizable as suburban Florida

camera.depth_of_field: vehicle sharp, background soft but recognizable

subject.description: Economy sedan: Toyota Corolla, Hyundai Elantra, or Nissan Sentra style — white or silver, immaculately clean

scene.location: Quiet residential street or suburban area in Orlando, Florida — Kissimmee or Lake Buena Vista area
scene.time_of_day: bright morning or midday Florida sun
environment: palm trees or Florida oak trees lining the street
scene.background_view: Quiet Orlando suburban street — residential neighborhood, no heavy traffic

lighting.type: Florida natural daylight — morning or midday
lighting.effects: clean highlights on vehicle body, warm Florida sun quality

accent: warm sunlight highlights on body panels
rules: Keep it clean and practical — no dramatic lighting
Florida suburban palette: blue sky, green palms, white vehicle

master_prompt: Create a clean editorial vehicle card image for a car rental search results page zone section. Show an economy sedan — Toyota Corolla, Hyundai Elantra, or Nissan Sentra style — in white or silver, immaculately clean, parked on a quiet residential street in suburban Orlando, Florida, such as Kissimmee or Lake Buena Vista area. Use a 3/4 side-front angle near eye level with the car sharp and the background softly recognizable. Background shows a clean Florida suburban street with palm trees or Florida oak trees, a Florida blue sky, and warm natural daylight. Use bright morning or midday Florida natural sunlight with clean highlights on the vehicle body. The image should feel practical, clean, and trustworthy — the efficient and affordable choice for Orlando airport-to-hotel-to-parks mobility. No people, no rental company logos, no convertibles, no overcast sky, no heavy traffic, no beach context, no watermarks, no generic stock photo energy.
